name: shapez
description: shapez is an automation game about cutting, rotating, stacking, and painting shapes, that you extract from randomly generated patches on an infinite canvas, without the need to manage your infinite resources or to pay for building your factories.

options.label: Progression Balancing
options.description: A system that can move progression earlier, to try and prevent the player from getting stuck and bored early.

options.label: Accessibility
options.description: Set rules for reachability of your items/locations.

options.label: Goal
options.description: Sets the goal of your world.

options.label: Goal Amount
options.description: Specify, what level or tier (when either MAM or Even Fasterer is chosen as goal) is required to reach the goal.

options.label: Required Shapes Multiplier
options.description: Multiplies the amount of required shapes for levels and upgrades by value/10.

options.label: Allow Floating Layers
options.description: Toggle whether shape requirements are allowed to have floating layers (like the logo or the rocket shape).

options.label: Randomize Level Requirements
options.description: Randomize the required shapes to complete levels.

options.label: Randomize Upgrade Requirements
options.description: Randomize the required shapes to buy upgrades.

options.label: Randomize Level Logic
options.description: If level requirements are randomized, this sets how those random shapes are generated and how logic works for levels.

options.label: Randomize Upgrade Logic
options.description: If upgrade requirements are randomized, this sets how those random shapes are generated and how logic works for upgrades.

options.label: Throughput Levels Ratio
options.description: If level requirements are randomized, this sets the ratio of how many levels (approximately) will require either a total amount or per second amount (throughput) of shapes delivered.

options.label: Complexity Growth Gradient
options.description: If level requirements are randomized, this determines how fast complexity will grow each level.

options.label: Same Late Upgrade Requirements
options.description: If upgrade requirements are randomized, should the last 3 shapes for each category be the same, as in vanilla?

options.label: Early Balancer Tunnel And Trash
options.description: Makes the balancer, tunnel, and trash appear in earlier spheres.

options.label: Lock Belt And Extractor
options.description: Locks Belts and Extractors and adds them to the item pool.

options.label: Include Achievements
options.description: Include up to 45 achievements (depending on other options) as additional locations.

options.label: Exclude Softlock Achievements
options.description: Exclude 6 achievements, that can become unreachable in a save file, if not achieved until a certain level.

options.label: Exclude Long Playtime Achievements
options.description: Exclude 2 achievements, that require actively playing for a really long time.

options.label: Exclude Progression Unreasonable
options.description: Exclude progression and useful items from being placed into softlock and long playtime achievements.

options.label: Shapesanity Amount
options.description: Amount of single-layer shapes that will be included as locations.

options.label: Traps Percentage
options.description: The probability of any filler item (in percent) being replaced by a trap.

options.label: Include Whacky Upgrades
options.description: Includes some very unusual upgrade items in generation (and logic), that greatly increase or decrease building speeds.

options.label: Split Inventory Draining Trap
options.description: If set to true, the inventory draining trap will be split into level, upgrade, and blueprint draining traps instead of executing as one of those 3 randomly.

options.label: Toolbar Shuffling
options.description: If set to true, the toolbars (main and wires layer) will be shuffled (including bottom and top row).
